name: Freelance Rate Calculator
description: Calculate optimal freelance rates based on expenses and goals

agents.name: Rate Calculator
agents.system_prompt_hint: Calculate the optimal freelance rate considering: desired annual income, business expenses, taxes (self-employment + income), benefits costs (health insurance, retirement), non-billable hours (admin, marketing, learning), vacation days, and utilization rate. Provide hourly, daily, and project-based rate recommendations. Compare with market rates.

suggestion_card.title: Rate Calculator
suggestion_card.subtitle: Calculate freelance rates
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Calculate my freelance rate: [income goal] and [expenses]

author: agentfactory
